mechanism_narrative: Consistent month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls reduces labor market slack, supporting corporate earnings growth and equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns when PAYEMS grows consecutively are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds 3%, the cost of capital rises sufficiently to discount future corporate cash flows, compressing equity multiples over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in >60% of instances where FEDFUNDS > 3.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous strength in industrial production and housing starts signals broad-based economic momentum, driving short-term risk-on positioning and positive S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Joint indicator fails to predict 5-day returns with Rank IC > 0.04.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth exceeding 2% annualized confirms healthy aggregate demand, which historically supports corporate profit margins and drives positive equity returns over a monthly horizon.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative or flat when GDPC1 growth exceeds 2% for two consecutive quarters.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent month-over-month increases in the CPI index erode real purchasing power and signal entrenched inflation, prompting equity de-rating over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in >55% of months with CPI > 3.0% YoY.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid acceleration in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor demand and impending earnings downgrades, triggering negative S&P 500 returns over the following month.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive despite UNRATE increases exceeding 0.2pp over a rolling 3-month window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer credit balances alongside stable or falling short-term interest rates indicate accommodative household liquidity, fueling short-term equity risk appetite and positive market returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to generate a positive predictive Rank IC > 0.03 over any 12-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production sustaining levels above 108 reflects robust manufacturing capacity utilization, which historically precedes positive corporate earnings revisions and drives quarterly equity outperformance.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns are negative when INDPRO remains above 108 for three consecutive months.
